Animal_input_name: laying hen <17 weeks, at farm {RER} Economic, U
Infrastructure_type: non-cage layer house on deep litter with drinkers and lighting
Infra_water_electricity_note: ESPAC livestock modules do not expose direct infrastructure/water/electricity variables for this row; literature/system proxy attached
Infra_water_electricity_citations: Producción sostenible en avicultura - Reports 222.03 L per 1000 hens per day, equivalent to 0.222 L/hen/day; used as the preferred Latin American-style layer water proxy. (https://dokumen.pub/produccion-sostenible-en-avicultura-l-6359269.html) | FAO small-scale poultry production - Reports that a laying hen can consume up to about 0.25 L/day of water, supporting the adopted 0.222 L/hen/day proxy. (https://www.fao.org/4/y4628e/y4628e03.htm) | Iowa layer-house electricity summary - Layer-house electricity around 10.1 kWh/day per 1000 birds was used, equivalent to 0.0101 kWh/bird/day. (https://blogs.millersville.edu/aest/2022/05/13/dr-haughery-publishes-research-findings/) | FAO small-scale poultry production - Intensive deep-litter housing is described for egg production with about 3 to 4 birds per m2; the midpoint 3.5 birds per m2 was retained, equivalent to 0.286 m2 per hen, as the non-cage layer-house footprint proxy. (https://www.fao.org/4/y5169e/y5169e02.htm)
Reference_output_basis_note: ESPAC egg counts are treated as weekly output and annualized with 52 periods/year before conversion to kg shell eggs using 0.056699 kg/egg; laying-hen live weight and feed are amortized over 1.50 producing years before normalization.
Diet_data_status: no diet share data in ESPAC; literature proxy attached from config
Ration_composition_note: no diet/ration fields found in avian module; literature proxy diet attached from inputs/02-05_espac_lci_coefficients.yml; main feed columns mapped from proxy diet as common compound feed, with no pasture or waste component
Diet_proxy_note: Semipasture or free-range scavenging was not quantified in the source; proxy covers balanced feed only.
Diet_proxy_citations: Evaluación de parámetros productivos en crianza de gallinas criollas (gallina feliz). Patoa de Vallejo-Pujilí - Reports 0.081 ± 0.002 kg balanced feed per hen per day in a semipasture system in Cotopaxi. (https://repositorio.utc.edu.ec/handle/27000/7769)

Animal_input_name: laying hen <17 weeks, at farm {RER} Economic, U
Infra_water_electricity_note: ESPAC livestock modules do not expose direct infrastructure/water/electricity variables for this row; literature/system proxy attached
Infra_water_electricity_citations: Producción sostenible en avicultura - Reports 222.03 L per 1000 hens per day, equivalent to 0.222 L/hen/day; used as the preferred practical water proxy for dual-purpose poultry rows. (https://dokumen.pub/produccion-sostenible-en-avicultura-l-6359269.html) | FAO small-scale poultry production - Reports that a laying hen can consume up to about 0.25 L/day of water, supporting the adopted 0.222 L/hen/day proxy. (https://www.fao.org/4/y4628e/y4628e03.htm) | Iowa layer-house electricity summary - A reduced fraction of the layer-house benchmark was retained as a small-scale poultry electricity fallback because no stronger Ecuador, Latin American, or FAO per-bird electricity factor was identified. (https://www.fao.org/4/y5169e/y5169e02.htm)
Reference_output_basis_note: ESPAC egg counts are treated as weekly output and annualized with 52 periods/year before conversion to kg shell eggs using 0.056699 kg/egg; laying-hen live weight and feed are amortized over 1.50 producing years before normalization.
Diet_data_status: no diet share data in ESPAC; literature proxy attached from config
Ration_composition_note: no diet/ration fields found in avian module; literature proxy diet attached from inputs/02-05_espac_lci_coefficients.yml; main feed columns mapped from proxy diet as common compound feed, with no pasture or waste component
Diet_proxy_note: Semipasture or free-range scavenging was not quantified in the source; proxy covers balanced feed only.
Diet_proxy_citations: Evaluación de parámetros productivos en crianza de gallinas criollas (gallina feliz). Patoa de Vallejo-Pujilí - Reports 0.081 ± 0.002 kg balanced feed per hen per day in a semipasture system in Cotopaxi. (https://repositorio.utc.edu.ec/handle/27000/7769)
